emails.subject: Re: Resume,
emails.body: Re: Resume, Vince, If you are interested in this candidate I would suggest that you talk to him directly. He probably is not a "fit" for the Global Technology Track. Thanks, Ashley Vince J Kaminski@ECT 10/24/2000 04:31 PM
